---
description: "Use when drafting or refining the System Architecture Document for the UM Hackathon Domain 2 submission."
name: "Draft SAD"
argument-hint: "Describe the system, flow, or files to cover"
agent: "agent"
---

Draft or refine the SAD for this repository.

Requirements:

- Show Z.AI GLM as a concrete service layer, not a vague AI box.
- Describe prompt construction, context contents, token limits, chunking, parsing, and validation.
- Include major components, APIs, data flows, and at least one core sequence.
- Keep deterministic calculations and rule checks outside free-form model output.
- Call out deployment, monitoring, privacy, and failure handling.

Do not leave architecture claims detached from the actual codebase.
